key.name: locale
key.description: The locale to use for translating month names, day names, and weekdays. Options: "fr" (French), "en" (English), or "system" (use system locale)

key.name: clock-decoration
key.description: The decoration text to display on both sides of the clock time. Use empty string to disable clock decoration.

key.name: decoration-before-clock
key.description: Whether to show the configured clock decoration before the clock time.

key.name: clock-position-in-status-bar
key.description: The position of the clock in the panel. Options: "left", "center", "right".

key.name: clock-index-in-status-bar
key.description: The index of the clock in the panel position.

key.name: decoration-after-clock
key.description: Whether to show the configured clock decoration after the clock time.

key.name: include-day-name
key.summary: Include day name in the date menu
key.description: Whether to show the revolutionary day name in the menu date line.

key.name: include-date-year
key.summary: Include year in the date menu
key.description: Whether to show the revolutionary year in the menu date line.

key.name: include-day-name-link
key.summary: Make day name clickable when possible
key.description: Whether to render the revolutionary day name as a clickable link when link data is available.

key.name: include-day-name-image
key.summary: Include image for day name link
key.description: Whether to render an image for the revolutionary day name link when image data is available.

key.name: include-day-name-image-link
key.summary: Make day name image clickable when possible
key.description: Whether to make the revolutionary day name image clickable when link data is available.

key.name: year-as-roman-numerals
key.description: Whether to display the Republican year in Roman numerals (e.g. CCXXXIV) instead of Arabic numerals.

key.name: delete-cache-older-than-days
key.summary: Delete cache files older than specified days
key.description: The number of days after which cache files should be deleted. Set to 0 to disable automatic deletion.
